named-query.name: Restaurant.findByNameAndCuisine
named-query.query: from Restaurant where name like concat('%', :name, '%') and cuisine.id= :id

named-query.name: Restaurant.existsByOwner
named-query.query: select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from Restaurant rest join rest.owners resp where rest.id = :restaurantId and resp.id = :userId

named-query.name: Order.isOrderManagedBy
named-query.query: select case when count(1) > 0 then true else false end from Order ord join ord.restaurant rest join rest.owners resp where ord.code = :code and resp.id = :userId
